channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Test de l’écran Nothing Projector Matte White : la toile blanche mate pour une image plus lumineuse mais moins contrastée
item.description: L'écran Nothing Projector Matte White, motorisé à montée depuis le sol, propose une approche radicalement différente des toiles ALR habituellement associées aux vidéoprojecteurs ultra courte focale. Nous l'avons testé.

item.title: De la Renault 5 de 1972 à la version 2026 : comment la sécurité a ajouté 20 cm à nos voitures
item.description: Chaque année, nos voitures gagnent quelques centimètres. On accuse le marketing des constructeurs, mais c'est surtout la sécurité qui fait grossir les gabarits.

item.title: Instagram will let users endlessly swap the audio on old posts
item.description: There's a symbiotic - and sometimes frustrating - relationship between social media sites and the creators that depend on them. Platforms need influencers' and creators' content to keep consumers on their apps; the creators, in turn, need to be able to reach those audiences to justify creating their content in the first place. Creators want […]

item.title: Instagram now lets you swap out the music in your old posts
item.description: With the new "Replace Audio," tool, users can update the music on their post at any time while keeping the post's existing likes, comments, shares, and reach intact.

item.title: Watch out - that Microsoft Calendar invite dated 2050 could be hiding stolen files and worse
item.description: Check your calendars for entries far into the future - especially if you're an Israeli entity.

item.title: Tesla Robotaxis go to Florida
item.description: It must be earnings day, because Tesla is making a Robotaxi announcement. The company said in a post on X that it was launching its Robotaxi service in Orlando and Tampa, attaching a pair of maps that show each city's service area. No word on fleet size or whether interested customers would be able to […]

item.title: '$3.7B lost to deepfakes' — Why social media is the perfect launchpad for AI fraud
item.description: From fake celebrity endorsements to phone calls, video meetings, and messaging apps, new Surfshark research finds people have lost at least $3.7 billion to deepfake fraud — and social media is the single biggest origin point. Here's how to stay safe.

item.title: Little House on the Prairie season 3 and beyond would be a 'dream come true' for one Netflix star — and we can even guess season storylines way before they're renewed
item.description: With season 2 currently in production, Netflix has yet to make a call on Little House on the Prairie season 3 and beyond. But with so much source material, one star says it would be a 'dream come true'.

item.title: A Sneaky Hacking Tool Targeting AI Infrastructure Is Lurking in Victims’ Blind Spots
item.description: A new type of malware can worm deep into AI coding systems to steal data and logins—and can flip a “death switch” to destroy files and keep out real users.

item.title: Meta Horizon+ subscriptions now include Xbox Game Pass starter edition
item.description: Meta Horizon+ subscriptions are now bundled with the starter edition of Xbox Game Pass.

item.title: Pop singer Lorde slammed Spotify’s AI ‘About the Song’ feature, claiming it’s full of nothing but false details — and now subscribers are starting to catch on
item.description: Lorde called out Spotify's About the Song tool, saying its details were incorrect and that it 'limits free interpretation'.

item.title: Best Buy takes up to $500 off Apple tech in its latest sale — I've picked the 10 best deals on MacBooks, iPads, Apple Watches, and AirPods
item.description: As part of its strangely timed Black Friday in July sale, Best Buy has slashed up to $500 off a variety of Apple tech, including AirPods, MacBooks, iPads, Apple Watches, and more.

item.title: Threads rolls out parental supervision tools
item.description: With the new tools, parents and guardians will be able to view their teen's time spent on Threads, set daily time limits, adjust sleep mode, and manage their privacy settings.

item.title: Victime de son succès, ce climatiseur Dreame 3-en-1 revient en stock à moins de 320 €
item.description: Il était en rupture de stock, mais le climatiseur portable 3-en-1 Dreame P-Wind10 fait son retour sur Amazon ! Capable de refroidir, déshumidifier et ventiler des pièces jusqu'à 25 m², il profite à nouveau d’une belle remise : au lieu des 359 euros habituels, il s'affiche à 319 euros.

item.title: Microsoft injecte « des milliards » de dollars dans Mistral, le champion français de l’IA
item.description: Microsoft s'apprête à injecter plusieurs milliards de dollars dans Mistral et à ancrer son intelligence artificielle en Europe. Un rapprochement qui pose une question : la pépite française peut-elle encore se dire souveraine ?

item.title: 'A reveal later this year has been planned' — Hold on to your sabers fellow Star Wars fans, a new report claims Knights of the Old Republic remake will finally be re-revealed soon
item.description: Five years after being announced, Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic remake will reportedly be re-revealed later this year.

item.title: Lego just unveiled a 1,500-piece X-Files set, complete with Mulder, Scully and a grey alien
item.description: The first Lego X-Files set costs $200 and will be available in August.

item.title: Google parle déjà de Gemini 4 et de son entraînement « le plus ambitieux à ce jour »
item.description: Google a dévoilé trois nouveaux modèles Gemini (dont une version 3.6 Flash) ce 21 juillet. Mais ça ne s'arrête pas là : la prochaine grande génération, Gemini 4, est déjà en préparation.

item.title: Google dévoile Gemini 3.6 Flash : une IA encore plus puissante, mais surtout moins chère
item.description: Google a dévoilé trois nouveaux modèles Gemini, dont un 3.6 Flash plus performant et, fait rare dans l'IA, moins cher que celui qu'il remplace. De quoi patienter en attendant le Gemini 3.5 Pro, toujours absent.

item.title: US threatens sanctions against Chinese AI models over IP theft
item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. could sanction Chinese open AI models over alleged IP theft, expanding the Trump administration's campaign to slow China's AI advances.

item.title: 'VPNs are lawful technical tools,' says EU Court in landmark Anne Frank copyright ruling
item.description: Are VPNs to blame for copyright infringement? The EU’s highest court just weighed in on a complex dispute over Anne Frank's diary, officially recognizing VPNs as "lawful technical tools" and protecting publishers who use effective geo-blocking. Here's what you need to know.

item.title: Apple va lancer Apple Upgrade, un programme de location inédit pour l’iPhone, le Mac, l’iPad et l’Apple Watch
item.description: Apple travaillerait sur un nouveau programme baptisé Apple Upgrade, qui permettrait de louer ses appareils, avec la possibilité de changer de modèle, de le racheter ou de le rendre en fin de contrat. Le lancement serait prévu le 28 juillet, mais seulement aux États-Unis dans un premier temps.

item.title: Time for a new smartwatch? Snag the Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic for 51% off ahead of Samsung Unpacked.
item.description: As of July 21, get the Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic for 51% off at Woot.

item.title: Arozzi Arena Nordico Electric Standing Desk review: minimalist design with maximum appeal, but key accessories cost extra
item.description: Too minimalist for its own good?

item.title: This Spotify setting makes your music feel DJ mixed
item.description: Spotify's DJ-inspired tools are loads of fun, but probably won't land you any bar mitzvah gigs.

item.title: Livres piratés pour entraîner l’IA | Accord de 1,5 milliard entre Anthropic et des auteurs
item.description: Aux États-Unis, une juge fédérale a approuvé un règlement de 1,5 milliard US en matière de droits d’auteur, aux termes duquel la société d’intelligence artificielle Anthropic versera à des milliers d’auteurs environ 3000 $ US par ouvrage, après avoir utilisé des copies piratées de leurs œuvres pour entraîner son agent conversationnel « Claude ».

item.title: Garmin finally made a screenless fitness tracker
item.description: The Cirqa Smart Band is Garmin's answer to Whoop and the Fitbit Air.

item.title: Samsung can’t afford to play it safe with Apple’s first foldable looming
item.description: Tomorrow's foldable-centric Galaxy Unpacked event looks like it will be Samsung's biggest in years. The company is expected to launch new versions of its Fold and Flip phones while also introducing a brand new Fold form factor that's shorter and wider. It would be the second upheaval to Samsung's foldable lineup in less than 12 […]

item.title: Fake FBI social media scams are on the rise — here's what to look out for
item.description: Victims reporting crimes to the FBI are actually being caught and revictimized, leading to further financial losses.

item.title: 10 tech deals for professionals I actually recommend from Best Buy's Black Friday in July sale
item.description: I uncovered my favorite business tech deals from Airtags and wireless printers, to action cameras and SD card readers.

item.title: Amazon has my favorite Bissell carpet cleaner marked down by 25% right now
item.description: As of July 21, you can get the Bissell Little Green Max Pet SmartMix carpet cleaner for $119.99, down from $159.99, at Amazon.

item.title: À quoi ressemblera le vélo cargo électrique de 2035 ? Ces étudiants imaginent le futur du transport urbain
item.description: Au travers de 8 concepts, les étudiants de l’Université de Hof (Allemagne) illustrent les possibles du vélo cargo électrique, qu’il soit longtail, biporteur, couché, ou à 3 roues, avec en bonus un prototype de course.

item.title: The Ecovacs Goat 01000 RTK robot lawn mower is on sale for under $700 at Amazon
item.description: The Ecovacs Goat 01000 RTK robot lawn mower is on sale for $698.99 at Amazon, down from the standard price of $999.99. That's a 30% discount.

item.title: Samsung aims to help you make more sense of health data with a new AI-powered assistant
item.description: The Health Assistant chatbot is available "in beta for eligible US users," Samsung says.

item.title: Is your college laptop struggling? This Intel i5 and 16GB RAM-powered Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 5 will get you back up and running for £499.99
item.description: This Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 5 drops to £499.99 at Amazon — it's a smart buy if you need a capable laptop for school, college, or just everyday use.

item.title: France Travail veut utiliser l’IA pour choisir les demandeurs d’emploi à contrôler en priorité
item.description: France Travail expérimente un système d'IA destiné à détecter les demandeurs d’emploi à contrôler en priorité. Pour y parvenir, l'algorithme analyse 26 variables.

item.title: The Light Flip Is the Stylish Dumb Flip Phone of Your Dreams
item.description: A flip phone with 5G, USB-C, a headphone jack, and a removable battery? Say it ain’t so.

item.title: Nvidia Wants to Own Every Chip Inside AI Data Centers
item.description: Nvidia’s Vera Rubin platform combines CPUs and GPUs into a single system, reflecting the company’s growing ambition to power every layer of AI infrastructure.

item.title: The Light Flip is a minimalist flip phone with a point to prove
item.description: A few years ago, the team at Light shipped the most smartphone-like device they'd ever created. The Light Phone III still kept to its minimalist, no-distractions ethos, but it was a phone-size rectangle with a phone-size touchscreen, a camera, and a number of other features. Some people loved having an almost-smartphone, but Kaiwei Tang, Light's […]...

item.title: Google launches a cheaper alternative to large AI security models like Mythos
item.description: Google is launching Gemini 3.6 Flash alongside a new security model dedicated to quickly finding and patching security vulnerabilities. In a blog post on Tuesday, Google describes Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber as a "cost-efficient and highly capable alternative" to larger, more expensive AI systems, such as the one offered by Anthropic's Mythos. The cybersecurity model […]...

item.title: Light made a flip phone — it’s colorful and it’s cheap
item.description: Light co-founder Kaiwei Tang helped create the Motorola Razr, and he's as surprised as anyone that over 20 years later, the flip phone is relevant again.

item.title: Exclusive: 'I will always say' — Marvel star Tom Hiddleston reveals whether you 'need to watch' Loki on Disney+ before Avengers: Doomsday is released
item.description: Do you need to stream Loki's TV show before you watch Avengers: Doomsday? The man behind the God of Mischief tells all.

item.title: The Light Flip is a minimalist flip phone that leaves out all those distracting apps
item.description: The new Light Flip is a mashup of the Light Phone III and an old-school flip phone.

item.title: Light Flip is a minimalistic, cheap flip phone that wont distract you
item.description: Light has announced Light Flip, its first-ever flip phone.

item.title: In case you forgot, AMC movie tickets are 50% off on Tuesdays and Wednesdays — its a year-round thing
item.description: Evening AMC movie tickets are half off on Tuesdays and Wednesdays every week. Plus, get 50% off popcorn and fountain drink combos.

item.title: Garmin just launched the screen-free Cirqa Smart Band, and it looks a lot like Whoop
item.description: Garmin just launched the screen-free Cirqa Smart Band. It looks like the Whoop, but no subscription is required.

item.title: Universal has dropped a terrifying trailer for new movie Other Mommy — and I can't wait for Jessica Chastain's return to horror
item.description: The director of the Zoom horror sensation Host is back, and he's brought Jessica Chastain along with him. Check out Other Mommy's terrifying trailer.

item.title: After TikTok, Snap settles social media addiction case
item.description: TikTok recently settled its portion of the case with the plaintiff ahead of a jury trial that starts next week in Los Angeles. YouTube has also reached a deal, leaving Meta as the only remaining defendant.

item.title: ‘The closest thing to an iPad Air in Android form’ — I was impressed by the Samsung Galaxy Tab S11, but there’s one area where it can't beat Apple
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Tab S11 is a direct rival to the iPad Air — but can it steal its compact tablet crown?

item.title: New Samsung Galaxy Card launches days before Unpacked event
item.description: Samsung is launching a credit card, because of course it is.

item.title: Ce champion de l’autonomie des smartphones milieu de gamme perd 130 € jusqu’à ce soir sur Amazon
item.description: Le Realme 16 Pro est un smartphone de milieu de gamme noté 8/10 dans nos colonnes, que nous recommandons chaudement avec son écran AMOLED 144 Hz, son capteur 200 Mpx et sa batterie de 6 500 mAh. Bonne nouvelle : il chute à 299 euros contre 429 euros de base.

item.title: AI music generator Suno breach affects 55M users, per Have I Been Pwned
item.description: A hacker took names, phone numbers, and physical addresses of millions of customers who used AI music generator Suno.

item.title: Trump’s 50% tariffs on Canada would include goods previously protected by the USMCA trade pact
item.description: The White House says the tariffs would go into effect in 30 days. President Donald Trump on Monday imposed 50% tariffs on most Canadian goods, declaring that Canada has unfairly discriminated against American autos, alcohol and dairy products.The move could unleash a new wave of economic chaos, with risks of higher inflation and further fraying of relations between two nations that had been closely woven together before Trump’s return to the White House. The administration official previewing the action said that Canada was one of the only nations other than China that retaliated against Trump...

item.title: Elles consomment plus que l’Europe : le boom des clims fait trembler le réseau électrique
item.description: Perçue par certains comme une solution qui entretient le problème, la climatisation est, pour d’autres, le meilleur moyen de faire face aux épisodes de chaleur extrême. Selon l’Agence internationale de l’énergie (AIE), l’intérêt pour les climatiseurs ne devrait cesser de progresser. Avec le retour probable d’un épisode El Niño, ces appareils pourraient séduire encore davantage de ménages, au risque de mettre les réseaux électriques mondiaux sous une pression croissante. ...

item.title: The UK will legalize plug-in solar on August 27
item.description: The UK has finally set a date for the legalization of plug-in solar panels.

item.title: Keep a tidier home with over $400 off the iRobot Roomba Max 705 robot vacuum
item.description: As of July 21, save over $400 on the iRobot Roomba Max 705 at Amazon.

item.title: DoorDash is offering DashPass members $40 off Sephora orders over $100 — here’s how to claim on July 22
item.description: DashPass members can save $40 on Sephora orders of $100 or more with promo code BEAUTY40 on July 22. Here’s how to claim the deal.

item.title: Stellantis taps Mobileye for hands-free driving assist
item.description: Stellantis will use technology from Intel's Mobileye to power its Level 2 hands-free driving features for its vehicle brands, the companies announced Tuesday. Starting in 2027, Stellantis will begin using Mobileye's EyeQ system-on-a-chip and a data crowdsourcing program called the Road Experience Management, or REM, which uses real-time data from Mobileye-equipped vehicles to build out […]...

item.title: Canva wants you to have full control over the design – Code 2.0 just does the heavy lifting for you
item.description: AI chatbots are rubbish at making edits to your designs – Canva Code 2.0 automatically creates elements for you to amend yourself.

item.title: Devant le nucléaire : le solaire a fourni 25 % de l’électricité en Europe, une première
item.description: Pour la première fois, le solaire a couvert un quart de l’électricité produite dans l’Union européenne sur un mois entier. Un cap qui montre à quelle vitesse le photovoltaïque s’installe sur le continent.

item.title: I asked AI for financial advice on everyday money decisions — and now I understand why regulators are worried
item.description: ChatGPT is a reassuring and knowledgeable money coach, but does that mean we should let our guard down?

item.title: Protecting creative storytelling in an AI-first marketing world
item.description: As AI dominates marketing, CMOs must guard human creativity to build authentic, lasting brand connections.

item.title: L’IA locale arriverait enfin sur les smartphones pas chers grâce à cette puce de Qualcomm
item.description: Qualcomm préparerait le Snapdragon 4 Gen 6, sa future puce pour smartphones pas chers. Sa nouveauté la plus intéressante tiendrait à un processeur dédié à l'IA, de quoi faire tourner des fonctions intelligentes en local, même sur un mobile à petit budget.

item.title: Ce logiciel gratuit m’a donné envie de tester tous mes câbles USB-C
item.description: Le logiciel WhatCable permet de tester vos câbles USB-C afin d’identifier ceux qui mentent sur leurs propres capacités. Gratuit, il intègre de nombreuses fonctionnalités pour vous dépanner au quotidien avec vos câbles et périphériques.

item.title: Other Mommy trailer: Yes, the one traumatizing moviegoers ahead of The Odyssey
item.description: Jessica Chastain returns to horror, in "Other Mommy" and we're here for it.

item.title: If youre heading off-grid this summer, grab DJIs portable power station while its half price
item.description: Get the DJI Power 1000 for $348.98 at Amazon — a 50% discount on a 2200W generator perfect for camping and RVs.
